Metadata.title: Root Access
Metadata.description: Improve how you use AI for Startup Proposals.

Hero.title: Improve how you use AI for Startup Proposals.
Hero.subtitle: RootAccess helps you build better prompts, test them with AI, review the output, and improve until it works.

HowItWorks.title: Generate Prompt -> Test with AI -> Get Feedback

idea.title: Generate Prompt
idea.description: RootAccess turns your startup context into a focused prompt for one proposal section.

workflow.title: Test with AI
workflow.description: Copy the prompt into ChatGPT or Gemini, then paste the AI output back into RootAccess.

proposal.title: Get Feedback
proposal.description: RootAccess scores the output, finds the top weaknesses, and suggests a better prompt.

onboarding.title: Use AI as a study assistant, not a submission shortcut
onboarding.body: Root Access helps with planning, outlining, research direction, and drafting prompts. It does not replace your original work, guarantee correctness, or encourage direct submission of AI output.

workflow.title: Review every AI output before it becomes your proposal
workflow.body: Use these prompts to create working material. Verify facts and sources, add your own reasoning, and rewrite the output in your voice before submitting anything.

FooterDisclaimer.body: Academic integrity: Root Access supports planning, outlining, research, and drafting. Verify sources, add your own analysis, and do not submit AI output as final work.

ErrorPage.title: Root Access could not load this screen
ErrorPage.description: Try again. If the issue continues, go back to the startup form and generate the workflow again.

NotFoundPage.title: Page not found
NotFoundPage.description: This route does not exist in Root Access. Return to the startup form to build a workflow.

GoalForm.title: Start with your startup context
GoalForm.description: RootAccess will create a starting prompt, then help you review and improve the AI output.
GoalForm.cardDescription: Keep it short. RootAccess reviews the output from your external AI tool, not a final proposal.

workflowMode.label: Choose workflow mode
workflowMode.description: Use the same startup context, then decide how much structure you need.

quick.title: Quick Mode
quick.description: A short branch for the specific startup task you choose.

deep.title: Deep Mode
deep.description: The same focused branch with prompt coaching and quality checks.

currentStage.label: What do you need help with now?
currentStage.error: Please choose the startup task you want to work on.

startupIdea.label: Startup idea
startupIdea.placeholder: AI study assistant for university students
startupIdea.error: Startup idea must be at least 3 characters.

industry.label: Industry
industry.description: Name the market or category your idea belongs to.

targetCustomer.label: Target customer (optional)
targetCustomer.description: Add this if you already know who you want to serve.

deadlineUrgency.label: Deadline urgency
deadlineUrgency.description: This keeps drafts realistic for your timeline.

availableTools.label: AI model
availableTools.description: Choose the model style you want Root Access to use.

workflowChoice.title: Workflow: Startup Proposal
workflowChoice.description: This MVP only supports Startup Proposal. Other workflow types are intentionally out of scope.

emptyState.title: Add your startup context first
emptyState.description: RootAccess needs your idea, industry, urgency, and AI model before it can create a useful prompt workflow.

ProposalBuilder.title: Build your startup proposal
ProposalBuilder.description: Choose a section, generate a draft, refine it with feedback, and save it into your live proposal preview.

builder.resultPlaceholder: Generate this section inside Root Access, then edit the draft here...

refine.title: Refine output
refine.placeholder: Example: make it shorter, clearer, more realistic, narrower market, stronger revenue logic...

preview.title: Your Startup Proposal
preview.description: Saved sections appear here live. This is the product: one proposal being built section by section.
preview.emptySection: Build and save this section to add it here.
preview.locked: Full export is a Pro feature in this CP3 business model flow.

upgrade.title: Unlock more proposal building
upgrade.description: The Free plan is intentionally limited so the MVP has a visible business model.
upgrade.proOffer: Pro: 50 generations, unlimited refinements, and full export.

errors.feedbackRequired: Add feedback before refining this section.
errors.generateFailed: Root Access could not generate this section right now.
errors.empty: The AI returned no usable draft.

problem.title: Problem
problem.objective: Explain the painful problem your startup solves.
problem.promptFocus: Specific user situation, current workaround, pain intensity, and why the problem matters now.

customer.title: Customer
customer.objective: Define the first target customer segment.
customer.promptFocus: Narrow segment, context, needs, buying/user behavior, and why this group is the first target.

validation.title: Validation
validation.objective: Describe how the team will validate the problem and solution.
validation.promptFocus: Interviews, surveys, tests, evidence to collect, and success signals.

marketSegment.title: Market Segment
marketSegment.objective: Clarify the market segment and initial beachhead.
marketSegment.promptFocus: Market category, first niche, alternatives, and assumptions that need verification.

revenueModel.title: Revenue Model
revenueModel.objective: Choose a realistic first revenue model.
revenueModel.promptFocus: Pricing logic, payer, willingness-to-pay assumptions, and a simple test.

competitiveDifference.title: Competitive Difference
competitiveDifference.objective: Explain why your solution is meaningfully different.
competitiveDifference.promptFocus: Existing alternatives, comparison criteria, defensible difference, and proof needed.

mvpScope.title: MVP Scope
mvpScope.objective: Define what the MVP includes and excludes.
mvpScope.promptFocus: Core value, must-have features, excluded features, and what can be built/tested first.

CheckoutPage.title: Fake checkout for CP3 monetization flow
CheckoutPage.description: This screen demonstrates how RootAccess can monetize prompt review loops without adding real payment integration yet.

card.title: Pro plan
card.description: Designed for students who need more prompt tests, output reviews, and improvement loops.
card.fakePayment: No payment is processed. This button only activates Pro demo mode in localStorage.

ProgressTracker.title: Progress
ProgressTracker.description: Finish one small action at a time.

resume.title: Continue where you left off
resume.description: Your local progress is restored. Continue with micro-step {stepId}.

StepCard.adaptedBadge: Adapted based on your available tools

actionLayer.title: Action
actionLayer.description: Generate inside Root Access, or copy the prompt if you want to inspect it.

learnLayer.title: Learn why this works
learnLayer.description: Optional prompt coaching, comparison, and tool reasoning.

reviewLayer.title: Review
reviewLayer.description: Check the output before completing this micro-step.
reviewLayer.waiting: Paste an output above to unlock review and completion.

StepCard.locked: Complete the previous micro-step to unlock this checkbox.

promptEditor.saved: Prompt edit saved locally. Copy uses your edited version.

outputDraft.title: Step output
outputDraft.description: Root Access writes the result here. You can still edit or paste revised notes.
outputDraft.placeholder: Generate with Gemini or paste useful notes for this micro-step...
outputDraft.hint: Exports will include this output when you add it.

execution.error: Root Access could not generate right now.

limits.generation: Free generation limit reached. Pro unlimited generations are ready for future billing.
limits.refinement: Free refinement limit reached. Pro unlimited refinements are ready for future billing.

refinement.title: Refine output
refinement.description: Tell Root Access what to improve, then regenerate this micro-step.
refinement.placeholder: Example: make it shorter, more formal, more realistic, or narrow the customer segment...

recommendations.generate: Generate an output first so the coach can review the work.
recommendations.refine: Refine this output before moving on; it still has weak spots.
recommendations.review: Review the checklist before completing this micro-step.
recommendations.continue: This output looks ready enough to continue after your own review.

signals.tooShort: The output looks too thin to use as proposal material.
signals.tooBroad: The output may rely on a broad customer or assumption.
signals.missingEvidence: The output needs a clearer validation, evidence, or verification action.
signals.tooLong: The output may be too long for this micro-step.
signals.checklistIncomplete: Some quality checks are still incomplete.

nextActions.generate: Use Generate with Gemini to create the first version.
nextActions.addSpecifics: Ask for one concrete example, user situation, or decision.
nextActions.narrowAssumption: Ask Gemini to narrow the customer, assumption, or segment.
nextActions.addEvidence: Ask for a validation action, source expectation, or signal to verify.
nextActions.shorten: Ask for a shorter version with only the essential bullets.
nextActions.finishReview: Complete the review checklist, then decide whether to continue.
nextActions.continue: Mark the step complete and move to the next micro-step.

toolRecommendation.title: Tool Recommendation
toolRecommendation.description: Use the best-fit tool, with backups when useful.

promptComparison.title: Prompt Comparison
promptComparison.description: Compare a weak request with the optimized prompt you should copy.
promptComparison.explanation: Why the optimized version is better

promptAssist.title: Prompt Assist
promptAssist.description: Open this before editing the prompt.
promptAssist.aiFocus: What the AI should focus on

qualityChecklist.title: Output quality check
qualityChecklist.description: Check these before marking the milestone complete.
qualityChecklist.completeHint: Complete every quality check to finish this milestone.

WorkflowCompletion.title: Workflow complete
WorkflowCompletion.description: Congratulations. You completed {workflowTitle} and checked off all required micro-steps.
WorkflowCompletion.summary: Summary: {completedCount}/{totalSteps} micro-steps completed. Review your copied prompts, verify the outputs, and edit everything before using it in your assignment.

ProposalDraftEngine.title: Startup Proposal Draft
ProposalDraftEngine.description: Root Access turns your completed micro-step outputs into an editable proposal draft.
ProposalDraftEngine.placeholder: Complete the workflow and generate a proposal draft here.
ProposalDraftEngine.error: Root Access could not generate the proposal draft right now.
ProposalDraftEngine.empty: Gemini returned no usable proposal draft.
ProposalDraftEngine.limitReached: Free proposal draft limit reached. Full proposal export is prepared as a Pro feature for future billing.

WorkflowExport.title: Export proposal draft
WorkflowExport.description: Copy or download your saved micro-step outputs.

FeedbackCard.title: Help us improve Root Access
FeedbackCard.description: Your feedback helps us learn whether this workflow actually reduces confusion, prompt retries, and time spent on startup assignments.
FeedbackCard.body: Share what worked, where you got stuck, and what would make the next version more useful for students.

WorkflowWorkspace.badge: AI Workflow + Output Review + Prompt Improvement
WorkflowWorkspace.title: Improve one startup proposal section at a time
WorkflowWorkspace.description: RootAccess creates the prompt, you test it in an external AI tool, then RootAccess reviews the output and improves the prompt.

action.promptHint: Copy this into ChatGPT or Gemini. RootAccess does not write the final proposal for you.
action.outputPlaceholder: Paste the output you received from ChatGPT or Gemini...

review.title: Score and diagnose output
review.description: RootAccess calls the review API to score the output and identify the top two weaknesses.
review.locked: Paste an AI output first to unlock scoring, weakness detection, and prompt improvement.

retry.title: Retry and compare
retry.description: Copy the improved prompt, run it in your AI tool, paste the new output, then compare scores.
retry.locked: Review the first output first to unlock the improved prompt.
retry.outputPlaceholder: Paste the new output generated from the improved prompt...

upgrade.title: Unlock more review loops
upgrade.description: The Free plan is limited so the MVP has a visible business model.
upgrade.proOffer: Pro: unlimited prompt generations, output reviews, and improved prompts.

errors.outputRequired: Paste an AI output before reviewing.
errors.reviewFailed: RootAccess could not review this output right now.

problem.title: Problem
problem.objective: Clarify the painful problem your startup should solve.
problem.promptFocus: Specific user situation, current workaround, pain intensity, urgency, and evidence needed.

customer.title: Customer
customer.objective: Define the first target customer segment.
customer.promptFocus: Narrow segment, context, needs, usage behavior, and why this group should be first.

validation.title: Validation
validation.objective: Plan how to test the problem and solution assumptions.
validation.promptFocus: Interviews, surveys, prototype tests, evidence to collect, and success signals.

revenue.title: Revenue
revenue.objective: Choose a realistic first revenue model.
revenue.promptFocus: Payer, pricing logic, willingness-to-pay assumptions, and a simple validation test.

mvpScope.title: MVP Scope
mvpScope.objective: Define what the MVP includes and excludes.
mvpScope.promptFocus: Core value, must-have features, excluded features, build constraints, and first test.
